salientSummary: Pull (ff-only) + Push (no force) toolbar buttons wired to NetworkOps; UpstreamSetSheet offers `git push -u` on missing-upstream; SecurityInvariantsTests grep-proves no --force / reset --hard / git clean anywhere in Sources; 6 ViewModel tests + 3 security-invariant tests green (195/195 KiteTests total) + 4 authored XCUITests; VAL-NET-002/003/004 and VAL-SEC-001/002/003 fulfilled.
whatWasImplemented: Extended Sources/ViewModels/NetworkOps.swift with pullFFOnly(on:), push(on:currentBranch:) returning PushOutcome (success / needsUpstream(branch:remote:) / failed), and pushWithUpstream(on:branch:remote:). Refactored fetch into a shared runStreaming(on:args:progressLabel:) helper that handles begin-progress → stream stderr → ProgressParser → classify-on-error → toast outcome; fetch/pull/push share this helper with their own arg vectors. Error classification uses the M1-fix-git-error-push-cases GitError cases: auth, nonFastForward, noUpstream, remoteRejected, hookRejected, protectedBranch. Added Sources/Views/Toolbar/PullToolbarButton.swift (arrow.down.circle icon, VAL-NET-002 wiring) and Sources/Views/Toolbar/PushToolbarButton.swift (arrow.up.circle icon, reads current branch via `git symbolic-ref --short HEAD`, presents UpstreamSetSheet on .needsUpstream; sheet never auto-confirms). Wired Pull + Push ToolbarItem(.primaryAction) beside FetchToolbarButton in RootView. Added Tests/KiteTests/ViewModelTests/NetworkOpsPullPushTests.swift (6 tests using bare-remote + author + tracker fixtures). Added Tests/KiteTests/SecurityInvariantsTests.swift (3 grep-based invariants over Sources/ — walks via #filePath, catches --force / reset --hard / git clean). Added Tests/KiteUITests/PullPushUITests.swift (4 XCUITests — authored, deferred per AGENTS.md KiteUITests skip until host TCC grants).
whatWasLeftUndone: KiteUITests suite remains deferred until host macOS accepts Accessibility + Automation prompts for xcodebuild (documented in AGENTS.md). XCUITests committed but not executed.

commandsRun.observation: 195 tests in 29 suites passed after ~81s (includes 6 NetworkOpsPullPushTests + 3 SecurityInvariantsTests added by this feature).

interactiveChecks.action: UI verification deferred: XCUITest harness blocked by host TCC; authored suite Tests/KiteUITests/PullPushUITests.swift is committed for later run.
interactiveChecks.observed: Not run in this environment — call out explicitly per swiftui-worker SKILL step 8.

discoveredIssues.description: SwiftFormat's `redundantSendable` rule strips explicit `Sendable` conformance from internal enums (PushOutcome). Swift auto-synthesises Sendable for enums whose cases are Sendable, so behaviour is unchanged, but the spec's literal signature `enum PushOutcome: Sendable, Equatable` is now `enum PushOutcome: Equatable`. Document explicitly for orchestrator visibility.
